message:
test(tui): add snapshot matrix for width, overlay, and semantic hierarchy (br-1xt0m.1.13.9)

30 new golden snapshot tests across 5 screens at 4 widths (80/100/120/160),
plus help overlay sizing at 3 sizes, overlay precedence (help over palette),
narrow terminal (30x10) rendering, and status segment text assertions.

16 new unit tests: 6 status bar breakpoint width matrix tests verifying
segment visibility at 50/60/80/100/120/160 cols, 5 help overlay sizing
calculations, 5 semantic color hierarchy validations across all themes,
plus overlay z-order chain and all-screens render-at-four-widths sweep.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
